title: phyllorkis paleacea
intro: Phyllorkis paleacea, also known as the yellow penda or Penda flower, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Phyllorkis paleacea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
